pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly downloads the opengeos Landsat sample to this destination path.
Verified via task.json description which explicitly instructs the agent to save the DIMAP product to this exact path.
Verified via task.json description which explicitly instructs the agent to export the PNG snapshot to this exact path.
Verified via task.json description which explicitly instructs the agent to save the SNAP session to this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: The data used is a real Landsat multi-band GeoTIFF downloaded from the opengeos data repository and placed at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The task instructions explicitly require generating three output files: /home/ga/snap_exports/investigation_product.dim, /home/ga/snap_exports/view_snapshot.png, and /home/ga/snap_exports/investigation_session.snap.
